No Fail Focaccia

No Fail Focaccia

So easy anyone can make it!

Yield: Serves 12 • Prep: P0DT0H10M0S • Cook: P0DT0H30M0S

Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups warm water
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil, plus more for greasing
  • 3 1/2 cups all-purpose flour
  • 1 tablespoon active dry yeast
  • 2 teaspoons sugar
  • 1 1/2 teaspoons salt
  • Kosher salt
  • 2 cloves garlic minced, or granulated garlic
  • 1 tablespoon fresh rosemary, chopped

Instructions

  1. Coat a 9x13-inch baking pan or dish liberally with olive oil.
  2. Combine warm water, olive oil, flour, yeast, and sugar in a large mixing bowl and beat on high with an electric mixer for 1 minute. Add salt and mix until incorporated.
  3. Transfer batter to prepared pan (it will be sticky) and cover with plastic wrap. Let rise at room temperature for 1 hour.
  4. When ready to bake, preheat oven to 375°F.
  5. Poke dough all over with the tip of your finger. Drizzle lightly with olive oil, sprinkle with salt, garlic, and rosemary.
  6. Bake until golden brown, about 30 minutes. Let cool 5 minutes before inverting onto a wire rack.
  7. Cut into pieces and serve. Enjoy!

Source: https://12tomatoes.com/no-fail-rosemary-focaccia/??utm_campaign=12t+daily+04232021
